problem id: 2f7f58de
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  00111110 -> 11111011
  11010111 -> 01010001
  00100000 -> 10000010
  01110100 -> 11010111
  11000011 -> 00000000
  01010100 -> 01010101
  01100101 -> 10010010
  11011000 -> 01101101

query: 10001011
predicted answer: 00100100
